changeSet.author: ai-assistant

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_sample_eorder' AND action_url = '/ElectronicOrders.do'

changeSet.comment: Updates Electronic Orders menu URL from old Struts route (/ElectronicOrders.do) to React route (/ElectronicOrders)

changeSet.author: ai-assistant

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_study_sample_eorder' AND action_url = '/StudyElectronicOrders'

changeSet.comment: Updates Study Electronic Orders menu URL from /StudyElectronicOrders to React route (/ElectronicOrders)
